name: devget-learning-platform
description: An award winning project providing free tech and AI education to underserved communities across Africa

scripts.install-all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: echo 'Run: npm run dev:backend (in one terminal) and npm run dev:frontend (in another terminal)'
scripts.build: npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend

author: DEVGet Learning
